# Orvnix

> Orvnix is a Kolkata-based studio (West Bengal, India) that designs and builds software, AI, LLM, robotics and drone systems. It embeds with a small number of teams at a time and delivers end to end — from product design and web/mobile development to AI agents, large language models, robotics and autonomous drones.

Orvnix works with clients worldwide and is based in Dum Dum, Kolkata. Engagements are flexible (ongoing, embedded, or fixed-scope one-off). The site is a showcase; the goal is to start a conversation by call or email — Orvnix does not sell products online.

Contact: admin@orvnix.com · [redacted] · Nalta, Bakultala Road, Dum Dum, Kolkata, West Bengal 700028, India

## Services

- [Product Design](https://orvnix.com/services/product-design): Research, UX, UI and design systems.
- [Web Development](https://orvnix.com/services/web-development): Fast, accessible, production-ready web apps and sites (Next.js, React).
- [Mobile App Development](https://orvnix.com/services/mobile-app-development): Native-quality iOS and Android apps.
- [Branding & Creative](https://orvnix.com/services/branding): Identity, motion and creative direction.
- [AI Agent Workflows](https://orvnix.com/services/ai-agent-workflows): Autonomous AI agents, RAG and workflow automation.
- [LLM Engineering](https://orvnix.com/services/llm-engineering): Fine-tuning, prompt/context systems and dependable model deployment.
- [Robotics](https://orvnix.com/services/robotics): Control systems, computer vision and firmware for real-world robots.
- [Drone Operations](https://orvnix.com/services/drone-operations): Autonomous flight, aerial mapping and data pipelines.

## In-house products (coming soon)

- Agentic AI Calling System: voice AI agents that book, qualify and follow up over the phone.
- Orvnix CRM: an AI-native CRM built around AI from day one.
